generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to maintain these alliances, they're free-riding on our efforts. It's time we focus on securing our own borders and civil liberties first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
